concept: Forge an adventure where you guide a troupe of theatrical stagehands who manipulate elaborate set pieces to help an oblivious protagonist navigate a story they believe is real. Coordinate scene transitions, lighting changes, and prop placements to create the illusion of a coherent world responding naturally to the hero's actions. Improvise solutions when the protagonist deviates from the script or questions inconsistencies in their reality. Gradually uncover why maintaining this elaborate charade is crucial to protecting both the performer and audience from a truth that exists beyond the theatrical boundaries.
